title: eryngium diffusum
intro: Eryngium diffusum, also known as sea holly, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its thistle-like flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of eryngium diffusum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Eryngium diffusum is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
